sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1
items.html: The first coupling for Partzuf Nekudim was in Nikvey Einayim of the Rosh of SAG. It did not take the AHP of the Rosh of SAG outside, since there is no absence in the spiritual. The matter of the division of the degree did not affect the Rosh of SAG itself whatsoever, but only as an addition to the Partzuf, and this is the Partzuf Se’arot. From the Nikvey Einayim upward emerged the Se’arot Rosh, and from there downward emerged the Se’arot Dikna in the phases of AHP. (Inner Light, Item 2)
